The Optimizely Feature Experimentation REST API enables developers to programmatically manage feature flags, experiments, rollouts, and environments within the Optimizely Feature Experimentation platform. It provides endpoints for creating and configuring experiments, managing feature variables, and controlling feature rollouts across different environments. The API includes both the v2 management API for projects and experiments, and the flags v1 API for flag-specific operations.

Contact Support:
 Name: Optimizely Support
